operations.longDescription:
Update an existing resource\
Depending on the update, you will require specific grants on this resource:
- Adding tag(s) requires action '$resourceType:apiovh:iam/resource/tag/add'
- Removing tag(s) requires action '$resourceType:apiovh:iam/resource/tag/remove'

(with $resourceType the type of the updated resource)

operations.description: Validate authorizations on a given resource
Remove a tag from a resource
operations.longDescription:
Remove a tag from a resource\
This action requires to be granted on action '$resourceType:apiovh:iam/resource/tag/remove' (with $resourceType the type of the updated resource)

operations.description: Add a tag to a resource
operations.longDescription:
Add a tag to a resource\
This action requires to be granted on action '$resourceType:apiovh:iam/resource/tag/add' (with $resourceType the type of the updated resource)

contract.description: Describe the contract of this operator, that is how it must be written

description.description: Describes how the operators works in human readable sentence

iam.policy.conditions.CombinatorOperator.description: Object describing the contract of this operator, that is how it be written

conditions.description: Tells if the operator can take sub conditions or not

maxConditions.description: If the operator can take conditions describes what is the maximum number of sub conditions it can takes

minConditions.description: If the operator can take conditions describes how much it must at least take

values.description: Tells if the operator can take values

iam.policy.conditions.ComparatorOperator.description: Object describing how to write a comparator operator, that is a final condition that should match OK/KO or not for a specific condition

example.description: Real world human readable example of the operator

functionDefinitions.description: Describe all the function handled by the current key

key.description: The key of the comparator, it is the identifier of the comparator, acting like its name

matchingValuesFormat.description: Describe the type (date / string ...) in which the matching against value must be written

parameterType.description: Describe the type (TZ / string) in which the parameter value if the operator has one must be written

template.description: Template on how the operator string must be written

iam.policy.conditions.ComparatorOperator.description: Object describing how a specific comparator operator must be written

maxArgs.description: Maximum number of arguments the function can take, if null then it can take infinite number of argument

minArgs.description: Minimum number of arguments the function must take

subsections.Authorization: These routes allow to validate authorizations granted on resources.
subsections.Logs: Routes allowing to forward IAM logs to a given log stream.
subsections.Permissions & policies: A policy is a document that describes what actions an account, user and/or group of users can perform, on which resources and under what conditions.
subsections.Reference: This section contains reference data used across the IAM.
subsections.Resources:
A resource represents any service bought by a customer and any asset that can be delegated in the IAM. A resource group is a set of resources belonging to a specific owner.
These routes allow to create and manage your groups.
